title: This Order Block Setup Made 3R In One Trade
description: Most traders scroll past the most powerful setup on the chart. This order block fair value gap combo is what funded traders actually look for — and beginners never see it. Watch the full breakdown. Follow R2F Trading for ICT setups that actually work.
